findings.description: Four Merge branch 'main' into feature/oidc-auto-login commits present; rebase requested by @illume twice.
Vague commit subjects 'frontend/helm: Address Copilot review comments' and 'frontend/backend: Address Copilot review comments' should describe the actual changes.
No component-level Vitest test for the auto-login useEffect covering redirect, skip-if-attempted, and skip-if-non-oidc scenarios — open since 2026-05-21 review.
Verify eslint exhaustive-deps passes after adding history to useEffect deps.
'oidcAutoLogin' in action.payload guard prevents partial setConfig from resetting the flag.
Full-page OIDC return clears sessionStorage flag before navigating to cluster page.
TestGetConfigIncludesOidcAutoLogin covers backend /config serialisation for the new field.
